ksa_text: Profile, assess, and evaluate data quality, completeness, consistency, and fitness for purpose against quality standards.

dcwf.top_element_label: Conduct quality control in order to determine validity and relevance of information gathered about networks.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-T-016 (Data Quality/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.470, highest: O*NET at 0.470). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Records management: retention schedules, archival processes, destruction workflows, regulatory records requirements, and records system administration.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.470, and Data Quality (DQ) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Quality KSA (composite 0.470)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Records Manager job postings does not surface this Data Quality competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
